articles.description: The following is a guest post and opinion from Aryan Sheikhalian, Head of Research at CMT Digital. Ethereum is betting big on a future filled with rollups. articles.title: Bybit Launches Solana-Based DEX ‘Byreal,’ Eyes Q3 Mainnet Debut
articles.description: Catenaa, Sunday, June 22, 2025-Cryptocurrency exchange Bybit is rolling out its first decentralized exchange, Byreal, built on the Solana blockchain. The platform will debut in testnet on June 30 and is slated for a full mainnet launch in the third quarter of 2025, the company announced Sunday. Bybit CEO Ben Zhou said Byreal aims to […]
